intro: Neolabatia sessiliflora is a plant species native to tropical regions, belonging to the family Anacardiaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in the treatment of various ailments such as wounds, infections, and gastrointestinal issues. The bioactive constituents of Neolabatia sessiliflora include flavonoids, alkaloids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Traditionally, Neolabatia sessiliflora is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
